creator: ted@wiz.plymouth.edu
text:
Submitter-Id:   current-users
 Originator:     Ted Wisniewski
 Organization:   Plymouth State College
 Confidential:   no
 Synopsis:       Attempting to write to a write-prot floppy causes system hang
 Severity:       serious
 Priority:       high
 Category:       [ kern ]
 Release:        FreeBSD 3.4-RC i386
 Class:          sw-bug
 Environment:
 
         Any FreeBSD release since at least 3.1
 
 Description:                        
 
      	Attempts to write a "write-protected" floppy will cause the system
         to hang.
 
 How-To-Repeat:
 
         Insert a floppy with the write-protect on and do:
 
         tar cf /dev/fd0 /etc/motd
